title: rate limiting behavior is undocumented
expectedBehavior: All implemented functions should be documented in the spec.
observedBehavior: The login function records failed passwords for valid email addresses, blocks later valid credentials after five failures, and clears attempts after a pre-threshold success; the spec does not mention this rate-limiting behavior.

deterministicFacts.statement: The spec does not mention rate limiting.
The implementation records failed passwords, blocks later valid credentials after five failures, and clears attempts after a pre-threshold successful login.

inference: Rate limiting was added intentionally but not documented; this gap should be closed.
